summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Guided Journey App iteration 8. All critical requirements verified: admin login redirects to /admin with full dashboard functionality, analytics show correct seeded data (18 users, 3 partners, 4 steps), demo user login works with 0% progress and first step active, all admin tabs functional, registration form accessible.
passed_tests: Admin login with admin@example.com / Admin123! redirects to /admin
Admin Dashboard shows Total Users: 18 (> 0)
Admin Dashboard shows Active Partners: 3 (exact requirement)
Admin Dashboard shows 4 steps with completion rates
Admin Users tab displays user table with role dropdowns
Admin Steps tab shows 4 seeded steps with reorder arrows
Admin Partners tab shows 3 seeded partners (TechVenture, Global Consulting, Innovation Labs)
Admin CMS tab shows editable sections (Home, About, Partners)
Admin Audit Log tab loads without errors and shows audit data
Demo user login with demo@example.com / Demo123! redirects to /dashboard
Demo user dashboard shows 0% progress
Demo user dashboard shows first step 'Complete Your Profile' as active
Demo user dashboard shows 4 steps in navigation
User registration form accessible and properly rendered
Backend API: All 43 API tests passed (100% success rate)
Backend API: GET /api/cms/home returns seeded CMS content
Backend API: GET /api/partners returns 3 partners without auth
Cookie configuration working (secure=True, samesite=none for HTTPS)
JWT authentication working with 2-hour access tokens
Seeded data correctly created: 4 steps, 3 partners, CMS content, demo user

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (19/20 tests passed - 1 minor DOM timing issue in registration test)
